title: Parties cannot back out of divorce settlement arrived at after mediation: Supreme Court
description: The Supreme Court recently held that a spouse cannot withdraw from a mutual divorce settlement after agreeing to dissolve the marriage as part of a full and final settlement of disputes.A Bench of Justices Rajesh Bindal and Vijay Bishnoi said that while the law allows parties to withdraw consent before a decree of mutual divorce is granted, this right cannot be used to avoid obligations under a settlement resolving all disputes between them.The Bench clarified that once parties agree on the term
